title: Hurley Boys Hybrid Short Size 18/20 XXL Black
description: The Hurley Boys Hybrid Short in Size 18/20 XXL Black is a stylish and comfortable pair of athletic shorts for boys. Made from 90% polyester and 10% elastane, these shorts feature a drawstring closure and a flat front design. With an 8-inch inseam and a regular fit, they are perfect for everyday wear or active pursuits. Easy to care for with machine washable material, these shorts are a versatile addition to any young boy's wardrobe. Representing the quality and style of the Hurley brand, these shorts are a great choice for boys looking for both style and performance.
